name: spora-plugin-media-archive-frontend
description: Vue IIFE bundle for the Spora Media Archive admin panel. Built and shipped as type spora-plugin-frontend.

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(async fs => { const txt = await fs.readFile('./frontend/main.js', 'utf8'); const ok = txt.includes('this.SporaAppMediaArchive=') && txt.includes('window.SporaAppMediaArchive=w,w') && /mount\(t,o\)/.test(txt) && /unmount\(t\)/.test(txt); console.log(ok ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'); process.exit(ok ? 0 : 1); })"
